round_3_changes: Per user feedback: Netmeds elevated from buried-in-bullets to a dedicated third deployment card in §03. Surfaced in 5 places (page title, hero eyebrow, hero subhead, hero status pill, §03 deep-dive card). §03 grid expanded from 2 to 3 columns. Honesty note explicitly flags that Netmeds operating numbers are not in the deck source — telemetry pull in flight. Recorded as D9 in spec §9. Footer Owner-line drift (M3) also resolved this round.
round_2_changes: Per user feedback: merged §03 Architecture into §02 What's live. The 4-layer frame stays as a compact strip; the 5 module screenshots that were under §04 Deep dive moved into §02 with each card now carrying a Layer NN eyebrow + status pill + live-for + anchor outcome. Page now flows hero → 01 Status → 02 What's live (layers + modules) → 03 Deep dive (JioMart + RBL only) → 04 In flight. Section-label run contiguous 01-04. Recorded as D8 in spec §9.

findings_round_1_status.C1: RESOLVED — Salman attribution corrected to Fynd-side
findings_round_1_status.M1: RESOLVED — Catalog single canonical TMS row at line 139
findings_round_1_status.M2: RESOLVED — Hero stat tile changed to 85% RBL shipment automation
findings_round_1_status.L2: RESOLVED — Citations now plain mono text

findings_round_2_new.issue: Linter-applied footer added 'Owner · Salman Saudagar (COO, Fynd) · v0.8.4' line, violating tone-of-voice §0 'No author / version metadata on the page' and spec D6.
findings_round_2_new.fix: RESOLVED — User explicitly requested the fix; Owner+version line stripped, footer reverted to canonical single-copyright pattern.

findings_round_2_new.issue: Layer 01 carries two pills inline: 'Live · + email-AI Building'. Reads slightly busy for a register card; an apex reader scanning pills sees one mixed-tier card.
findings_round_2_new.fix: Acceptable given the inline 'email-AI Building' qualifier explicitly tags the building piece, matching tone-of-voice §3 mixed-tier tagging rule. No change required.

structural_audit_round_2.override_documented: D8 in spec §9 — merge §03 Architecture into §02. Recorded.

strengths: Merge collapsed three blocks (architecture stack, module table, module screenshot strip) into one coherent §02 — removes the double-counting flagged in audit round 1 commentary. Each module card now carries layer + status + live-for + anchor outcome in one place.
Section-label run contiguous 01-04; spec D8 documents the override per the audit framework's no-undocumented-overrides rule.
All 5 module screenshots load 200 from CDN (socialassets.impetusz0.de); local mirror retained as belt-and-suspenders fallback.
Zero banned vocabulary, zero exclamation marks, zero forward-looking phases without dates. Hero stat tiles plain English.
Honesty contract intact — every Live claim carries a Live pill; the building email-AI piece in Layer 01 is inline-tagged Building per tone-of-voice §3.
